narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 2-E (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,058 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.3 percentage points.
